title: Toxic Air
summary: Toxic air damages health over time without protection.
body: Toxic air is common in swamps, ruins, and industrial zones.
Gas masks and Atmospheric Scrubbers reduce exposure.
Bring filter cartridges before entering toxic regions.
steps: Equip a gas mask or deploy a scrubber.
Ensure filters are installed and charged.
Monitor health while in the zone.
commonMistakes: Letting the scrubber run out of power.
